title: HIding columns on managed templates
excerpt: I want to hide columns on a view in a managed board, but when i published that change the hide columns dont apply to the managed boards.

posts.author: gvelasco1493 (Gerardo Velasco Aguiar )
posts.cookedHtml: I want to hide columns on a view in a managed board, but when i published that change the hide columns dont apply to the managed boards.
